title: senecio eurycephalus var. lewisrosei
intro: Senecio eurycephalus var. lewisrosei, also known as the Lewis's Hawk's Beard, is a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Senecio eurycephalus var. lewisrosei include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusing the leaves in hot water or making a tincture to be used in tea or as a topical application.
